subject: passageway width
fact: The narrow passageway constricts to only five feet wide in places.
source_quote: constricts to only five feet wide in places

subject: passageway ceiling height
fact: The ceiling of the narrow passageway rises to thirty feet.
source_quote: ceiling rising to thirty feet

subject: damage to Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim takes eleven points of damage from the poisonous spores.
source_quote: takes eleven points of damage

subject: The Waydown journey time
fact: The Waydown is located a half-day's journey from Hillsfar.
source_quote: a half-day's journey from Hillsfar

subject: The Waydown depth
fact: The sinkhole at The Waydown descends one hundred feet to a swift-flowing underground river.
source_quote: descends one hundred feet to a swift-flowing underground river

subject: journey to Howling Pits duration
fact: The party travels through rough tunnels and caves for two days to reach the Howling Pits.
source_quote: travels through rough and less worn tunnels and caves for two days

subject: Howling Pits tunnel dimensions
fact: Tunnels in the Howling Pits vary between ten to thirty feet wide and just as tall.
source_quote: tunnels varying between ten to thirty feet wide and just as tall

subject: Howling Pits wind masking distance
fact: The howling wind in the Howling Pits masks sounds more than seventy-five feet away.
source_quote: masking sounds more than seventy-five feet away

subject: fire giants count
fact: Two mutated fire giants ambushed the party in the Fire Giant Cave.
source_quote: two mutated fire giants ambushed the party

subject: Underground River Cave width
fact: The underground river in the Underground River Cave is fifteen feet wide.
source_quote: fifteen-foot wide, swift-flowing underground river

subject: Cloaker Tunnel width
fact: The Cloaker Tunnel constricts to only five feet wide in places.
source_quote: constricts to only five feet wide in places

subject: Cloaker Tunnel ceiling height
fact: The ceiling of the Cloaker Tunnel rises to thirty feet.
source_quote: ceiling rising to thirty feet

subject: Red Plume guards count
fact: Two nervous Red Plume soldiers are stationed at The Waydown.
source_quote: Two nervous guards in splint armor

subject: Magical Gloves cost
fact: The magical gloves for the Owlbear were crafted at a cost of one hundred gold pieces.
source_quote: at a cost of one hundred gold pieces

subject: Goggles of Night cost
fact: Daein purchased the Goggles of Night for two hundred gold pieces.
source_quote: purchased by Daein for two hundred gold pieces

subject: Catapult spell damage
fact: Felkur's Catapult spell dealt only four points of damage to the giant.
source_quote: dealing only four points of damage

subject: Protective Field damage reduction
fact: Daein's Protective Field ability reduces incoming damage by four points.
source_quote: reduces incoming damage by four points

subject: Spirit Guardians radius
fact: Bramgrim's Spirit Guardians spell creates a radiant aura with a fifteen-foot radius.
source_quote: fifteen-foot radius around the caster

subject: Pass Without Trace bonus
fact: The Pass Without Trace spell grants a plus ten bonus to Stealth checks for the entire party.
source_quote: grants a plus ten bonus to Stealth checks

subject: Pass Without Trace duration
fact: The Pass Without Trace spell has a duration of one hour.
source_quote: duration is one hour

subject: Fly spell duration
fact: The Fly spell granted by the mandolin has a duration of one hour.
source_quote: duration of one hour

subject: Fly spell recast limit
fact: The mandolin cannot cast the same spell again until the next dawn.
source_quote: until the next dawn

subject: Fly spell daily limit
fact: The mandolin can only cast the same spell once per day.
source_quote: once per day
